items.description: V. Two large homemade samosas with crispy, golden pastry filled with potato and peas.

items.description: GF. Tender chicken pieces flavoured with yoghurt and spices, cooked in a traditional clay tandoor oven.

items.name: Chicken 65
items.description: GF. Boneless chicken pieces marinated in southern Indian spices, coconut and chef's special masala.

categories.name: Global Curry Favourites
categories.description: All curries can be cooked either mild, medium, or hot. Please advise us of your preferred choice when ordering.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: GF. Diced tandoori chicken breast cooked in a creamy, tomato, ginger, almond and cashew sauce.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.description: GF. Diced tandoori chicken breast cooked in an almond, onion and tomato sauce with diced onion, capsicum and fresh herbs.

items.name: Chicken Khorma
items.description: GF. An aromatic creamy chicken curry with a mildly spiced, rich-textured onion, almond and cashew sauce.

items.name: Lamb Rogan Josh
items.description: GF. A special curry made with succulent lamb, fried onions, ground spices, tomato and herbs.

items.name: Lamb Khorma
items.description: GF. An aromatic creamy lamb curry with a mildly spiced, rich-textured onion, almond and cashew sauce.

items.name: Beef Vindaloo
items.description: GF DF (MEDIUM OR HOT). A spicy curry made with red chillies, cumin, vinegar and tomato.

items.name: Beef Goan
items.description: GF DF. A delicacy of Southern India, tender beef cooked with tomato, onion, fresh herbs and spices, coconut and curry leaves.

categories.description: All curries can be cooked either mild, medium, or hot. Please advise us of your preferred choice.

items.name: Chicken Curry (Boneless)
items.description: GF. A traditionally cooked savoury chicken curry cooked with onion, tomato, ginger and garlic.

items.name: Goat Curry (With Bones)
items.description: GF. A traditional savoury "on-bone" goat curry cooked with onion, tomato, ginger and garlic. Cooking on-bone gives the curry an unique flavour.

categories.name: Signature Curries
categories.description: All curries can be cooked either mild, medium, or hot. Please advise us of your preferred choice when ordering.

items.name: Lamb Cashew
items.description: GF. A delicious thick, nutty lamb curry cooked with cashew nut and secret spices. Goes well with saffron rice.

items.name: Eggplant Pasanda
items.description: V GF. Rolled, stuffed eggplant cooked in a very rich gravy made with almonds, cashew nut paste and cream.

items.name: Chicken Nilgiri
items.description: GF. Succulent chicken pieces in a sauce of freshly ground mint, yoghurt, coriander, fresh coconut and aromatic spices.

items.name: Murg Balti
items.description: GF. An aromatic curry of succulent chicken in a traditional balti sauce made with roasted cashew paste, onion, tomato and cream.

items.name: Prawn Goan
items.description: GF DF. Fresh prawns cooked in a spicy coconut sauce with tomato, tamarind, cumin, coconut cream and dry red chillies.

items.description: VG GF. Traditional tempered dahl with garlic, chillies, onions, tomatoes, curry leaves and mustard seeds.
